stories.description: Right drawer responsiveness: the columns prop accepts a responsive value `{ lg, md }`. On screens < 1440px the drawer automatically switches to the `md` column count. Recommended responsive mappings for end-positioned drawers: - 3 cols → `{ lg: 3, md: 4 }` - 4–5 cols → `{ lg: 4, md: 6 }` / `{ lg: 5, md: 6 }` - 6+ cols → `{ lg: 6, md: 10 }` (up to 10)

const WithHelpIcon = () => <DsFormControl
    label="Input label"
    required

                type="button"
                onClick={() => alert('Help clicked!')}

                style={{
                    background: 'none',
                    border: 'none',
                    padding: '4px',
                    cursor: 'pointer',
                    color: 'var(--color-dap-gray-500)',
                    display: 'flex',
                    alignItems: 'center',
                    justifyContent: 'center',
                    width: '16px',
                    height: '16px',
                    borderRadius: '50%',
                }}
            >
                <DsIcon icon="info" size="small" />
            </button>
        ),
    }}>(<>
        <DsFormControl.Description>
            This is a description text. It's an optional and will not exceeds more than 2 rows. A{' '}
            <button
                type="button"
                style={{
                    background: 'none',
                    border: 'none',
                    padding: 0,
                    margin: 0,
                    cursor: 'pointer',
                    color: 'var(--color-dap-blue-600)',
                    textDecoration: 'underline',
                    fontSize: 'inherit',
                    fontFamily: 'inherit',

                onClick={() => alert('Learn more clicked!')}

                Learn more

            can be added.
        </DsFormControl.Description>
        <DsFormControl.TextInput
            placeholder="Search"
            slots={{ startAdornment: <DsIcon icon="search" size="tiny" /> }}
        />

rows.description: Number of rows in the grid (defaults to 1)

columns.description: Number of columns in the grid (defaults to 12)

gutter.description:
Gap between grid cells.
A number is treated as px. A string is used as-is (e.g. `"1rem"`, `"var(--grid-gutter)"`).
CSS default (when omitted): `16px` — set by `$gutter` in `_grid-variables.scss`.

margin.description:
Padding around the grid container.
A number is treated as px (uniform). A string is used as-is (e.g. `"16px 20px"`, `"var(--grid-margin)"`).
CSS default (when omitted): `16px 20px` — set by `$margin-y $margin-x` in `_grid-variables.scss`.

direction.description:

alignItems.description: Cross-axis alignment of children (maps to CSS `align-items`).

justifyContent.description: Main-axis alignment of children (maps to CSS `justify-content`).

flex.description: Flex shorthand applied to the stack itself (maps to CSS `flex`).

flexWrap.description: Whether and how children wrap onto multiple lines (maps to CSS `flex-wrap`).

width.description: Width of the stack container (maps to CSS `width`).

components-tagfilter.description: Design system TagFilter component A component for displaying active filters as tags with overflow handling. Non-tag elements (label, expand/collapse, clear) sit in a header row. Tags occupy the full width below, wrapping as needed.

reactDocgen.description:
Design system TagFilter component

A component for displaying active filters as tags with overflow handling.
Non-tag elements (label, expand/collapse, clear) sit in a header row.
Tags occupy the full width below, wrapping as needed.
